142923.name: Daily new estimated infections of COVID-19 (ICL, mean)
142923.description: Values are for the mean estimate.

source.name: Imperial College London, COVID-19 Estimates (2021)
source.dataPublishedBy: MRC Centre for Global Infectious Disease Analysis, Imperial College London
source.additionalInfo: Data from Imperial College London (ICL) estimating the true number of COVID-19 infections for currently 193 countries and regions. Estimates and countries covered are as of 5 March 2021. More details can be found at https://mrc-ide.github.io/global-lmic-reports/.

145471.name: Daily new confirmed cases due to COVID-19 (rolling 7-day average, right-aligned)
145471.s_name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 22 March, 10:02 (London time)

source.name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 22 March, 10:02 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University. Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, hospitalizations, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.
